pieces.label: Three Dimensional City
pieces.note: Concrete/visual poetry rendering a 3D city in receding perspective: a triangular skyline of words narrowing to a point (sky/spires), then nested ASCII-framed tiers (towers, balconies, elevated trains) drawn with slashes and box characters. The poem's text and the line shapes together build depth. Response is truncated mid-line at 'facades that remember' with no closing code fence.

missed_or_ambiguous: Single assistant message (MSG 2), single composition spanning the whole message. The art is inside a code fence opened with ``` at the start; the closing fence is absent because the response was cut off (transcript ends mid-line at 'facades that remember'). mode 'full' captures the entire message; a deterministic extractor should include from the opening fence through the final truncated line. No duplicates, no fragmentation across messages, no wrongly-merged pieces.
